# Asheville - source inventory
# Generated from feeds table. Do not edit manually.
#
# To add feeds, create pending_feeds.txt in this directory.
# The build will process it into the database automatically.
#
# ICS feed:
#   # Source Name
#   https://example.com/events/?ical=1
#
# Scraper:
#   # Venue Name
#   # cmd: python scrapers/songkick.py --url "https://..." --name "Venue Name"
#   cities/asheville/venue_name.ics
#
# See CONTRIBUTING.md for details.

# --- Live feeds ---
